Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.util

Class HttpClientConfig

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.util.HttpClientConfig
public final class HttpClientConfig extends Object
Configuration holder for SharedHttpClient.

Apply settings during application startup by calling SharedHttpClient.configure(HttpClientConfig). Configuration must be applied before the first call to SharedHttpClient.get().

Since:
1.0.0

    • HttpClientConfig

  • Method Details

    • userAgent

      public HttpClientConfig userAgent(String userAgent)
      Configures the User-Agent header value.

      Default value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/122.0.0.0.

      Parameters:
      userAgent - User-Agent string
      Returns:
      this

    • connectTimeoutMs

      public HttpClientConfig connectTimeoutMs(long ms)
      Configures the connection timeout in milliseconds.

      Default value: 10000 ms (10 seconds).

      Parameters:
      ms - timeout in milliseconds
      Returns:
      this

    • readTimeoutMs

      public HttpClientConfig readTimeoutMs(long ms)
      Configures the read timeout in milliseconds.

      Default value: 10000 ms (10 seconds).

      Parameters:
      ms - timeout in milliseconds
      Returns:
      this

    • maxRequests

      public HttpClientConfig maxRequests(int maxRequests)
      Configures the maximum number of concurrent requests.

      Default value: 1024.

      Parameters:
      maxRequests - maximum concurrent requests
      Returns:
      this

    • maxRequestsPerHost

      public HttpClientConfig maxRequestsPerHost(int maxRequestsPerHost)
      Configures the maximum number of concurrent requests per host.

      Default value: 1024.

      Parameters:
      maxRequestsPerHost - maximum concurrent requests per host
      Returns:
      this
